hypothesis_en: The R01101 room is closed for the counting of votes. The session is suspended, which will be resumed by announcement by the bell and monitors when the count is over.
reference_en: so would the tellers move to room R zero one one O one to count the votes (1.08) we now (3.58) interrupt the sitting and you will hear a bell and have signs on the screens when the sitting sitting is to be resumed
